parents.subject: LU-18838 llite: Add inode to struct ll_statahead_info

commit.subject: LU-18838: llite: Debug NULL ctx
commit.message:
LU-18838: llite: Debug NULL ctx

This is just a test patch to verify a potential source
of context becoming NULL unexpectedly in the statahead thread.

Change-Id: I9842e468f3f9585c4bd0a4d5c4ed81b2f31081c7
Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
